title: The biggest Texas AM stereotypes
body: I remember when I was a junior in hs, I was talking with a friend who got accepted to his 1st choice: A&M. And he mentioned that he was gonna buy a new car and I asked why since I thought it ran fine. He said that his current car was orange and that he heard stories from alumni of students with orange cars being vandalized and destroyed while on campus cause the color resembled UTA. They’re crazy over there 😂.
author: @vivs9314

title: The biggest Texas AM stereotypes
body: Lived here my whole life, it is a cult. Great example, guy I knew started a business with the term "Aggieland" in the name and got business solely on that from alumni lol. Customer was showing off his ring and the business owner was like "yeah, i don't wear mine to work" lmao. People have too much pride in where their student loan debt/parents money goes.
author: @djhudgins8412

body: They are so right! I just moved here, and even though I'm a Texan, I had no idea how much these 2 towns bleed and vomit maroon!!

author: @PabloAlqa

title: Texas A&M University - Full Episode | The College Tour
body: I’m still in my sophomore year in high school and I hadn’t even bothered to look into colleges yet but a friend of mine who is from Texas told me to look into A&M so here I am! I love how many deeply rooted traditions the University has (especially the corps of cadets) and I love how it is clearly an incredible community! I haven’t made any decisions on where I will go for college but I now know that Texas A&M will be on the short list. There is a good chance I will one day be an Aggie and a member of the corps!

title: Best Student Housing Texas A&M University College Station | Apartments Near TAMU
body:
College Station has a massive issue with convenient housing; either you will find a new luxurious option with high prices or old and relatively cheap,
you cannot find something in between. However, I suggest these are the only good options there:
The Gardens TAMU & Cherry Street apt everything else is bad

title: EXPOSING Texas A&M… #college #collegelife #university #texasam
body:
Campus is 1 to 2 hours from Houston and Austin. 3 hours to dallas. The thumbs up is for "gig 'em." Its a practice of gigging frogs. It first came up before a game in 1930 vs tcu.

The campus is beautiful. Huge. Could use some color though, I agree.
